title: valerianella lasiocarpa
intro: Valerianella lasiocarpa, also known as hairy cornsalad or hairy valerianella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is a leafy green herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and promote relaxation. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety, and support overall health and well-being. Valerianella lasiocarpa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or added to salads, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
